items.name: Msgr. Roger Landry
items.role: National Director, The Pontifical Mission Societies · Member, Vatican Dicastery for Evangelization
items.quote: Christa Dalmazio makes everything she’s involved with beautiful. Whether she’s singing (opera, theater or liturgical music), performing (piano, organ or harp, viola, violin or cello), directing (small ensembles or choirs), or teaching, she brings a passion for excellence and execution that always elevates. She is an artist and person of the highest caliber.

items.name: Catherine Malfitano
items.role: Operatic Soprano · Voice Faculty, Manhattan School of Music

items.name: Robert Cardinal Sarah
items.role: Prefect Emeritus · Vatican Dicastery for Divine Worship

items.name: Frank La Rocca
items.role: Composer-in-Residence · Benedict XVI Institute for Sacred Music and Liturgy
items.quote: Christa's dedicated work in sacred music—including her work with Higher Word—is vitally important to the restoration of the Beautiful and the healing of our culture.

items.name: Fr. Jonah Teller, O.P.
items.role: Parochial Vicar · Church of St. Joseph, Greenwich Village, New York
items.quote: The joy Christa takes in her work is a delight, and it is so encouraging to know that she is putting her talents at the service of the Church’s worship of God.

items.name: Rev. H. Todd Carter
items.role: Pastor, Holy Innocents Church · Neptune, NJ
items.quote: When Christa performs, it is like the angels themselves are visiting the Mass. When she teaches, she’s like a wise nurturing mother who wants you to do your best. She does everything to the best of her ability and always for the greater glory of God.

items.name: Peter Carter
items.role: Founder & Director, Catholic Sacred Music Project · Director of Sacred Music, Aquinas Institute, Princeton University

items.name: Dr. Jennifer Donelson-Nowicka
items.role: Founding Director, Catholic Institute of Sacred Music · St. Patrick’s Seminary

items.name: Dr. Mary Catherine Levri
items.role: Associate Professor of Organ & Church Music · University of Notre Dame
